items.name: D-1 Tactical Modular Helmet
items.description:
Join the Group for more UGC like this:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/50422001/Osu-Corp#!/about
Front face optic: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/111316850067895/D-1-Stealth-Night-Vision-Modular-Optic
Full Armour version: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/79102492553459/D-1-Tactical-Modular-Helmet

The D1-VANGUARD division understands that some days you want to feel the breeze of a gloomy warzone, and other days you'd prefer not to have a breeze enter your skull. This modular system offers the best of both worlds. Start with the lightweight tactical frame for maximum acoustic awareness during urban pacification, then snap on the heavy ballistic plating when the high-caliber greetings start flying. It’s corporate-mandated safety that actually looks intimidating in the company newsletter. Remember: At OSU Corp, a helmet is cheaper than a new employee.

items.name: Marble Butterfly Shoulder Companion [PBR]
items.description:
🦋 “Not just an accessory — it’s a living piece of art.” ✨
Perched upon your shoulder, this marble-winged butterfly isn’t ordinary. Its cracked crystal-like wings glisten with soft light, while golden chains sway gently with every step you take. Wearing it feels less like fashion and more like carrying a fragment of a magical tale on your shoulder. Perfect for avatars who want to be remembered, not just noticed.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
One-of-a-kind marble wings that shimmer like enchanted stone
Golden chain ornaments that dance with your movement
A shoulder companion that turns heads in fantasy and fashion worlds
Crafted with PBR textures for striking realism and artistic flair
🔍 Keywords: butterfly, marble, magical, shoulder, fantasy, enchanted, elegant, stylish, wings, unique
✨ Don’t just accessorize — make your avatar a legend.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
